data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for signature capture on high-value items.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for capturing a recipient's signature for high-value items, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or validation of this requirement, leading to a clear gap. The linked use case mentions the need for a signature but does not provide any API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that this requirement is fulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of recipient signature capture implementation or validation for high-value items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recipient signature requirement for high-value items.
